summary: Raw vertical phone footage of HSI and ATF officers in tactical vests arresting and tackling a resisting man (Roberto Herrera) to the ground next to a work truck in a San Diego parking lot. The captured audio is live shouting/struggle in Spanish, not music. It is unedited body-of-arrest footage with no cinematic production, music, or genre styling.
notable_text: Vests read POLICE FEDERAL OFFICER, HSI, ATF POLICE
